titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 130: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 130. (A.R. No. 690 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGUḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, Gaṇēśa shrine, Neḍuṅgaḷanāthasvāmin temple.

This inscription records that Śēṉdaṉ Kāri alias Sembiyaṉ vaḍa Puṟaiyūr-nāṭṭu Mūvēndavēḷār purchased six vēli of land inclusive of 3/4 vēli for a tank and housesite areas, from the sabhā of Tirunārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Miyseṅgiḷi-nāḍu and got them made tax-free. The donor then distributed this 5(1/4) vēli of land among twelve brāhmaṇas: 1. Kāchchuvaṉ Brahmanārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭa Sōmayāji 2. Mogaliyaṉ Śerumaṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ 3. Kavarkāśi Iḷaiya Vāsudēvaṉ 4. Kavarkāśi Brahmaṉ Sōmaṉ 5. Kavarkāśi Brahmaṉ Tāyaṉ 6. Mōgaliyaṉ Seyyāṉ Serumaṉ 7. Kavarkāśi Vāśudēvaṉ 8. Valava Māppugaḷi-bhaṭṭaṉ 9. Kavarkāsi Siddaṉ Subrahmaṇya Sōmayāji 10. Vīravalla Śivadāśa Kramavittaṉ 11. Mōgaliyaṉ Bhūti Nārāyaṇaṉ 12. Mōgaliyaṉ Sōmaṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ. He directed them to remit the land tax (vāḍākkaḍaṉ) at the rate of 1 kalam, 1 tuṇi and 1 padakku per mā of land, thus the total amounting to 157 kalam, 1 tūṇi and 1 padakku of paddy per annum payable in perpetuity to the temple of Kayilāyattu-Mahādēva (at Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam). The area of land given to each of the above said brāhmaṇas, the land tax (in terms of paddy) payable by each and the service to be financed by that amount were meticulously specified.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 321.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu vaṭapuṟaiyūr nāṭṭu
centaṉ kāriyāṉa cempiyaṉ vaṭapuṟaiyūr ṉāṭṭu mu
ceṅkiḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunārāyaṇacaturvetimaṅkalattu sa
bhaiyāriṭai nāṉ Iṟaiyiliyāka vilaikoṇṭa nilam Ivvūr ḻikka
ḻak koṇṭanilam Aṟuveli Ivvaṟuveli nilattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai sabhai
nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kuṭinilattiṉ vaṭavarukey kiḻakkoṭi
ya vāykkālukkum Āṟṟukkulait talaivāyiṉ nilattukkum durgaiyār nilat
tukku vaṭakkum miypāṟkellai kuṭinilattiṉ kiḻarukeypoṉa pilāṟuṭpaṭa pilāṟṟukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ellaip peruvaḻikkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunā
ṉkellaiyuḷ ḷakappaṭṭa nilam Aṟuveli Itaṉil kuḷattukkum Ūriruk
kaikkumāka nilam mukkālu nirnilaṉ Aiñcekālum Āka Innilam Aṟuveliyum
ivvūrk kāccuvaṉ brahmanārāyaṇabhaṭṭa somayājiyārkkum mokaliyaṉ cerumaṉ nārāyaṇa
ṉukkum kavarkāci Iḷaiyavāsudevaṉ kavarkāci piramaṉ comaṉukkum kavarkāci piramaṉ
tāyaṉukkum mokaliyaṉ ceyyāṉ cerumaṉukkum kavarkāci vāsudevaṉukkum valava
māppukaḷibhaṭṭaṉ centaṉveḷḷaikkum kavarkāci cittaṉ subrahmaṇya somayājiyār
kkum viravalla śivadāsakramavittaṉukkum mokiliyaṉ pūti nārāyaṇaṉukkum mokili
yaṉ comaṉnārāyaṇaṉukkum Āka Ippaṉṉiruvarkkum nāṉ dhanmadāṉamāka Ivvaṟu veli velini
lam Aṭṭikkuṭuttu Iñilattil kuḷamum ñilamaṉaiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka nikki nir nilam
Añcekālum Ivvūr śrīkayilāyattu mahādevarkku Aṭṭuvatāṉa Iṟainellu māttā
ṟkalane tūṇippatakkāka kiḷḷikuṭidevar cūlakkālāl Āṇṭu varai vāṭākkaṭa ṉaṭṭuvatāṉa I
ñellu nūṟṟaimpatteḻu kalane tūṇippatakkillum Idevarkkuc tirucceṉṉa
ṭaiyākat tiruvamutu Uccampotaikku Arici nāṉāḻikku nellukkuṟuṇi Iru nāḻiyum kaṟiya
mutukkum neyamutukkum tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum nellu nāṉāḻiyum śrīpalik
key viḷakkukku Eṇṇaikku nellu nāṉāḻiyum tirumeḻukku Iṭuvāṉukku nittam nellu muṉnā
ḻiyum Āka nicatam nellup patakku Aññāḻiyāka Āṇṭuvarai nellu Eḻupatteṇ(ṅ) kalane Irutūṇikkuṟu
ṇiyum maṭṭakkaṭavār kāccuvaṉ brahmanārāyaṇabhaṭṭa somayājiyār nilaṉ Eṇ(ṇ)māvaraikkiḻ Araikkā
liṉāl nellu paṉṉirukalane Irutūṇi kuṟuṇi muḻākke Āḻākku mokiliyaṉ comaṉ(nā)
nārāyaṇaṉ nilam Oṉpatumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Eḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nellu patiṉ mukkala
ne Irutūṇi kuṟuṇi Aṟuṉāḻiyum kavarkāci Iḷaiya vāsudevaṉ kāri nilam Oṉpatu mākkāṇik muntirikaikkiḻ Eḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nel
lup patiñkalamum kavarkāci piramaṉ comaṉ nilam Aṟumā Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaik kiḻkkāliṉāl nellu Oṉpatu kalane mukku
ṟuṇi Aññāḻi Uḻakkum kavarkāci piramaṉ tāyaṉ nilam Aṟumāviṉāl nellu mukkalaṉe tūṇippatakkum mokili
yaṉ cerumaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkāle Araikkāliṉāl nellu paṉniru kalane tūṇippatakku ṉānāḻi kavar
kāci vāsudevaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyāl nellup patiṉkalane Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Aṟuṉāḻi Uḻakkāḻākkum Iññe
llu tirukkoyil Uṭaiyār vacam kār pātiyum piyāṉam pātiyum
Aṭṭuvatākavum Iśrīkoyiṟ koṭṭum Uvaccar Āḷ nālukku nittam nellu patakkaññāḻi
Āka Āṇṭuvarai nellu Eḻupatteṇkalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇiyum Aṭṭakkaṭavār kavar
kāci vāsudevaneṉ nilam Araimā Araikkāṇik kiḻ Eḻumāvaraiyāl nellu Irutūṇi mukkuṟu
ṇi nāṉāḻi muḻākke Āḻākkum valavū naṭṭaṉ centaṉ veḷḷai nilam Eṇmāvarai Araikkāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻ Eḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nellu patiṉ mukkalane Aṟunāḻi Uri Āḻākkum kavarkācit taṉ subrahma
ṇyasomayājiyār nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyiṉāl nellu Irupattaiṅ kalane Iru tūṇippatakku Irunāḻi
Uriyum viravalli śivadāsakramavittaṉ nilam Orupatu māviṉ kiḻ Eḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nellu patiṉmu
kkalane tūṇippatakku muṉṉāḻiyum mokiliyaṉ pūti nārāyaṇaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻ Eḻumāvarai
yiṉāl nellu paṉnirukalane tūṇippatakku ḻiyum mokiliyaṉ somaṉṉārāyaṇaṉ nilam Eṭṭu mākkā
ṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ nāl nellu paṉṉirukalane Irutūṇi Eḻunāḻiyum Āka Iñ
ñellu Eḻupatteṇkalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇiyum Ivai Uvaccarkku kārpātiyum picāṉampātiyum Aṭṭuvatākavum
āka Iññellu nūṟṟu Aimpattu Eṇkalane tūṇippatakku Idevarkku Iññivantappaṭi cantrātittavaṟ Āṇṭu
varai Aṭṭuvatāka Ipparicu Iṉnilañ � lappāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ ceṉtaṉ kāriyāṉa cempiyaṉ va
ṭa puṟaiyūrṉāṭṭu muveṉtaveḷāṉe m Eḻutineṉ Ittirunārāyaṇaccaturvedimaṅkala
ttu madhyastaṉ brahmapriyaṉāṉa paḻana veḷāṉeḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai . § .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
